patterns.template: WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN org, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN org, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT {n}
question_templates: {context}哪些机构专利最多？列出前{n}名

patterns.template: MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization {{entity_type: '{org_type}'}}) WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN org, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT {n}

MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province IS NOT NULL AND loc.province <> '' WITH loc.province AS province, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN province, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT {n}

MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country IS NOT NULL AND loc.country <> '' WITH loc.country AS country, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN country, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT {n}
RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT {limit}
RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.abstract_cn AS abstract, p.application_date AS date LIMIT {limit}
RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC LIMIT {limit}
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count WHERE toInteger(year) >= {start_year} RETURN year, count ORDER BY year

question_templates: {context}转让次数最多的专利被转让了几次

patterns.template: WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.transfer_count > 0 THEN p END) AS with_transfer, count(DISTINCT p) AS total RETURN with_transfer, total, round(with_transfer * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100 AS ratio

WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.litigation_count > 0 THEN p END) AS with_litigation, count(DISTINCT p) AS total RETURN with_litigation, total, round(with_litigation * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100 AS ratio
